message:
test(runtime): add policy-as-data controller integration tests (bd-382tk.4)

44 tests covering PolicyConfig deserialization (TOML/JSON/Cargo.toml),
validation (17 invalid-value rejection tests), PolicyRegistry concurrent
hot-swap safety, default policy ↔ hardcoded constant parity (9 config
types), and evidence ledger switch event capture (JSONL format, monotonic
IDs, switch count tracking).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
